name: Mac Data Overview
description: Broad metadata snapshot of this Mac for baseline / drift detection. Walks launchd persistence, TCC permissions, recently quarantined downloads, KnowledgeC activity, and Biome streams. Plaintext — metadata only, no message or page bodies. Useful as a recurring baseline you can diff against later.

plugins.role: Launch agents + daemons + StartupItems + BAM (background activity monitor)
Recent quarantine events (downloads + AirDrop + iMessage attachments)
Activity bundles — which apps + URLs were active across the day
Biome streams: app usage, location, focus mode, notification activity
